notableEvents.label: Spencer Steer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Steer grounds into a double play, shortstop Cooper Pratt to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Sal Stewart out at 2nd. Spencer Steer out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: JJ Bleday pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: JJ Bleday strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Nathaniel Lowe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nathaniel Lowe walks. Eugenio Suárez to 3rd. Noelvi Marte to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: JJ Bleday pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: JJ Bleday grounds out to first baseman Jake Bauers.

notableEvents.label: JJ Bleday pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: JJ Bleday walks. Jose Trevino to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers grounds into a double play, shortstop Cooper Pratt to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Elly De La Cruz out at 2nd. Dane Myers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers grounds into a double play, shortstop Cooper Pratt to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Elly De La Cruz out at 2nd. Dane Myers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Vaughn pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Vaughn doubles (12) on a ground ball to left fielder JJ Bleday. Brice Turang scores. William Contreras scores. Jake Bauers scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Edwin Arroyo singles on a line drive to right fielder Sal Frelick. Edwin Arroyo to 2nd. Edwin Arroyo advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by right fielder Sal Frelick.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
